title: ETH futures traders lean into $1.6K range lows: Will Ether lead market recovery?
summary: ETH traders increased their long positions as Ether price traded near 2026 lows. Will ETH’s rebound eclipse the BTC recovery?

title: Three signs that XRP price risks falling below $1 in June
summary: XRP is forming head-and-shoulders and bear flag setups on its shorter-timeframe chart, both indicating a dip below $1 in the coming days.

title: Stocks Rally as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal Is Near: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street powered a rally in stocks as oil sank after President Donald Trump signaled the US is close to a deal with Iran, fueling hopes for an end to the war that has roiled global markets.

title: Iran Not On List of Countries Trump Says Have Agreed to Deal
summary: Bloomberg's Michelle Jamrisko said that while President Trump said that a deal to end conflict with Iran has been approved by a host of MidEast countries, Iran itself is not included on that list. title: BitGo Launches Lightning Earn to Let Institutions Put Bitcoin to Work on Lightning Network
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

BitGo Launches Lightning Earn to Let Institutions Put Bitcoin to Work on Lightning Network
BitGo launched Lightning Earn, enabling institutional bitcoin holders to earn BTC-denominated fees by providing Lightning Network liquidity through an integration with Amboss Rails.

title: Nasdaq-Listed Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto Sells BTC, Cuts Debt and Authorizes Share Buyback
summary: Nakamoto, the Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin services and treasury firm, sold about $48 million worth of BTC and derivatives to help reduce debt.

title: Coinbase Launches Tool That Lets AI Agents Trade Crypto and Make Payments for Users
summary: Coinbase's new product allows AI agents to execute crypto trades, payments, and portfolio management tasks within user-defined limits.

title: Americans secretly drove as much as $34 billion in offshore prediction market bets, new report claims
summary: A new report from a boutique consulting firm claims that nearly a third of U.S. prediction market volume occurs on offshore platforms.

title: Arbitrum token jumps 5% on news LG Electronics is building a new blockchain
summary: LG’s new Arbitrum-based blockchain will serve as a platform for placing, buying, selling, and managing digital ads.

title: India protests to US after three sailors killed in tanker attack
